slots.caption_ig:
How we score: 5 axes, 100 points each. Execution. Ingredient quality. Ratio. Value. Ambiance. We read every review for those signals — not stars. The scorecard is on every dish page.

#ForkFox #FoodRanked #FoodScience #DishNotRestaurant #FoodSmart
slots.caption_fb: Most apps give you a star average. We score 5 specific things — execution, ingredient quality, ratio, value, ambiance — and show you the scorecard on every dish page. No black box. You can see exactly why a dish got the rank it got.
slots.image_gen_prompt: Clean radar chart on dark background, 5 axes labeled. Red plot line. Editorial graphic, no text. 1080x1080.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 9s. Radar chart appears axis by axis with labels. Each label shows for ~1s. End frame: 'How we score.' Score axes named: execution, ingredient quality, ratio, value, ambiance.
